theme_and_archetype.description: A premium, industrial, and engineering-focused aesthetic. Built around strict Swiss grid principles with bold typography and extreme contrast. The primary tone is 'Dueblå' (Dove Blue) which is used as a sophisticated background or accent, sharply contrasted with stark Black for a powerful, museum-grade automotive heritage feel.

rules.body: text-base md:text-lg leading-relaxed font-normal text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-300

colors.rules: Black is the anchor contrast color. Use pure black for heavy borders, typography, and section dividers. Dove blue (#587187) acts as a brand identifier, softening the harsh industrial feel while remaining highly premium.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Swiss Grid (12 columns desktop, 1 column mobile)
layout_and_spacing.rules: Asymmetrical composition is mandatory. Never center-align all content. Use the left edge as a strict anchor. Leave generous negative space. Borders should be 1px solid black or dove blue to define structure.

components.buttons: Sharp edges, 0px border-radius. High contrast. Black background with white text, or Dove Blue background with White text. Hover state: invert colors or slide-up animation.
components.timeline: Vertical black 2px line. Dates in massive Cabinet Grotesk, descriptions in IBM Plex Sans. Left-aligned on grid.
components.cards: No standard floating cards. Use border-collapse style grids. 1px black borders separating content modules.
components.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 or bg-[#0B0E12]/80) but with a harsh 1px bottom border. Crisp, wide spacing.

animations.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling if possible. Reveal sections on scroll with Framer Motion (opacity 0 to 1, translate Y 20px).
animations.hover: Image zoom inside strict overflow-hidden containers. Text color fill on hover.

media.description: Dramatic highway shot of a Scania truck, cinematic.
Classic red semi truck, heritage feel.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over 'Dove Blue' background meets WCAG AA guidelines. Use #000000 text on Dove Blue for maximum stark contrast.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (timeline nodes, nav links, buttons) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='nav-history-link').

page_sections.content: Scania Heavy Trucks branding. Full screen image overlay. Huge Cabinet Grotesk typography.
Brand History (1891 to present) represented via a vertical timeline. Deep dove blue background.
Marcus Wallenberg, Traton/Volkswagen Group acquisition story. High contrast black & white editorial grid.
L-series, V8, R-series, S-series. Image-heavy grid layout.
Electric Vehicle production section. High tech, futuristic dark section.
Next 5 years roadmap. Electrification, autonomous trucks. Dark grey/blue background with crisp typography.
Massive black footer. Large typography 'LET\'S TALK HEAVY METAL'. Basic contact info.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'IBM Plex Sans' via Google Fonts or custom font faces.
Implement a responsive layout strictly using Tailwind CSS utility classes.
Do NOT use generic rounded cards with shadows. Follow the 'Swiss Brutalist' styling: sharp edges, 1px lines, high contrast.
Integrate Framer Motion for scroll reveals.
Ensure the Dove Blue color ('#587187') is heavily utilized alongside pure black.
